sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29731" key="dwdekaplasia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκα-πλᾰσιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n29731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">multiply by twelve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
